concerns.detail: Large deletion of substantive allegations regarding advisor Sikai Chen (UW-Madison), including specific claims about data fabrication, forcing students to perform personal errands and pay rent, and equipment/resource misallocation. This appears to suppress legitimate observations about advising practices rather than cleanup typos or off-topic content.
concerns.excerpt:
UW-Madison Sikai Chen
  - 上学的时候一堆造假paper
  - 把学生逼到腰出问题做手术，躺在床上养病，还push该学生写proposal
  - 逼迫学生凌晨送他去机场，去他家给他洗碗
